arts.sum: All the reaction to an action-packed afternoon of football as Rangers win at Tannadice.

arts.ttl: Nick Walsh sparks Hotline meltdown as Rangers 'vendetta' claims sees conspiracy theorists emerges over Diomande red
arts.sum: Craig Swan took your calls as referee Walsh came under fire for his performance at Tannadice

arts.ttl: Rangers to appeal against Diomande red card
arts.sum: Rangers will appeal against Mohamed Diomande's red card in Sunday's 3-1 win over Dundee United in the Scottish Premiership.

arts.ttl: 6 VIP pundits react to Rangers red card stooshie as Sutton boils Boyd's blood with a quip for the ages
arts.sum: Boyd has urged Rangers to get their appeal in pronto but Sutton simply tells him slapping simply isn't allowed

arts.ttl: Cyriel Dessers strike caps Rangers’ fightback victory at Dundee United
arts.sum: Rangers came from behind to win for the first time in the Premiership this season with an eventful victory over Dundee United at Tannadice. The home side took the lead through the loan striker Sam Dalby but Mohamed Diomande levelled for Rangers and Robin Pröpper put his side ahead shortly after half-time with a deflected drive. Cyriel Dessers, who had scored a stunning equaliser in the 2-1 Europa League defeat by Manchester United on Thursday, added a wonderful third goal. There was more drama when Diomande, returning after being suspended for the game at Old Trafford, was controversially sent off in the fifth minute of added time by the referee, Nick Walsh, for tangling with the United defender Kevin Holt. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mo Diomande sees Rangers red card addressed as SFA offer guidance on Nick Walsh flashpoint
arts.sum: Diomande was shown a straight red in stoppage-time after a tangle with Kevin Holt at Tannadice

arts.ttl: Clement erupts with Rangers touchline rage over Diomande's red as Sky Sports host puts it back on prickly boss
arts.sum: The furious boss took issue with the big call by Nick Walsh at Tannadice

arts.ttl: Away hoodoo be damned for Rangers but Nick Walsh red card causes mayhem in bonkers crescendo – 3 talking points
arts.sum: The Ibrox side had conceded the opening goal in seven games and not won but something has changed

arts.ttl: Rangers come from behind to beat Dundee United
arts.sum: Mohamed Diomande scored and was later sent off.
